chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.171 of 2024 Harbin Electric International Co. Ltd. & another Versus Siddiq Sons Ltd. & another Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply as at “A” 2. For orders on CMA 1019/24 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 27.05.2024 M/s Shahzad Rabbani and Muhammad Abdullah Alam for appellants. Mr. Omer Soomro for respondents. -.-.- Learned counsels for appellants have made a request for withdrawal of this appeal on instructions of the appellants. Appellants’ request is not objected by Mr. Soomro. Appeal as such is dismissed as withdrawn with no orders as to costs along with listed application. Judge Judge
